title: Indomitable (Majestic-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Majestic''-class}}
{{Youmay|the Majestic-class ship|[[Indomitable (disambiguation)|other uses of the word]]}}
The '''''Indomitable''''' was a [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]] that served as [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] of [[Task Force Aster]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]]. It participated in the [[Hunt for Zsinj|campaign]] against [[Zsinj]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II||Indomitable, (4)}}</ref> Years later, it fought at the [[Battle of Doornik-319]],<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref> and at the [[Battle of ILC-905]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].<ref name="Tyrant's Test 1">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref>

''Indomitable'' was directly commanded by [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand|Brand]], the task force commander; [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Theb Tobbra]] served as first officer, and [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Threld]] was another member of the bridge crew.<ref name="Tyrant's Test 1" /> The [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] included the [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wings]] of the [[16th Fighter Squadron]] and the [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wings]] of the [[24th Bombardment Squadron]].<ref name="Shield of Lies" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Indomitable'' was first identified as a [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]] in the [http://www.sff.net/people/k-mac/black.htm Black Fleet Crisis FAQ] at author [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]]'s website. In the trilogy, she is described as a "star cruiser" on her first mention in ''[[Shield of Lies]]'' in 1996 and subsequently referred simply as a "cruiser". This information was later supported by ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. The ''Encyclopedia'' also made a connected with a ship named ''Indomitable'' which first appeared in ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'' in 1994.
